heading: Service of process
label: 152510 Service of process
text: The corporation shall have a designated agent in the District of Columbia to receive service of process for the corporation. Notice to or service on the agent, or mailed to the business address of the agent, is notice to or service on the corporation.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15251036:465(b)., .Aug. 13, 1953, ch. 429, § 5(b)67 Stat. 571The word “have” is substituted for “maintain” for consistency in the revised title. The words “at all times” are omitted as unnecessary. The words “to receive” are substituted for “authorized to accept”, and the words “is notice to or service on” are substituted for “shall be deemed notice or service upon”, for consistency in the revised title.
